sources.title: Yang-Xue-An-Tai Decoction Treats URSA by regulating the differentiation of proliferating decidual stromal cells through multiple targets.
sources.evidence: URSA mice exhibited enhanced NK cell-proDSC communication ... which were attenuated by YXAT.

sources.title: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge alleviates pulmonary fibrosis by promoting fibroblast mitophagy.
sources.evidence: SM inhibited TGF-β1-induced fibroblast activation and collagen formation.

sources.title: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge alleviates pulmonary fibrosis by promoting fibroblast mitophagy.
sources.evidence: Mechanistically, SM inhibited TGF-β1-induced Smad2/3 signaling.

sources.title: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge alleviates pulmonary fibrosis by promoting fibroblast mitophagy.
sources.evidence: RNA-seq analysis revealed that SM enhanced mitophagy.

sources.title: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge alleviates pulmonary fibrosis by promoting fibroblast mitophagy.
sources.evidence: SM activated PINK1/parkin signaling in cultured fibroblasts.

sources.title: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge alleviates pulmonary fibrosis by promoting fibroblast mitophagy.
sources.evidence: SM increased the mitochondrial LC3BII/I ratio.

sources.title: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge alleviates pulmonary fibrosis by promoting fibroblast mitophagy.
sources.evidence: PINK1 knockdown weakens the anti-activating effect in fibroblasts.

sources.title: Salvia miltiorrhiza Bunge alleviates pulmonary fibrosis by promoting fibroblast mitophagy.
sources.evidence: AKT inhibition weakens the anti-activating effect in fibroblasts.
